name: domo-to-databricks-dbt
description: Domo Magic ETL → dbt on Databricks migration agent. Five custom skills — domo-ingestion, tile-translation, org-dbt-conventions, databricks-materialization-policy, migration-validation — that transpile Domo dataflows into a runnable, tested, DAG-orchestrated dbt-databricks project. Overlays defer to the official dbt and databricks agent skills.
